results.rendered_html: hiri—śipra mfn. ‘golden-cheeked’ or ‘having a golden visor’ (applied to Agni and Indra),  RV.  (= haraṇa-śīla-hanu, ‘one whose jaws carry away or seize’, or = dīptozRIza, ‘having a bright head-dress’,  Sāy. )

hiriśipra adj. gelb —, goldwangig; einen goldenen Helm (oder Visir) tragend: Agni  ṚV. 2,2,5 . Indra 6,29,6 .
— Vgl. hariśipra, hiraṇyaśipra.
